zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Woodcock於大約1452年出生在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特時，他的父親Sir William Woodcock32歲，母親Alison Livesey27歲。他於大約1476年與Lady Ursula Woodcock在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1522年12月在英國倫敦享年71歲。

zh-hans.curten, Lancaster, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾蘭卡斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Woodcock于大约1452年出生在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特时，他的父亲Sir William Woodcock32岁，母亲Alison Livesey27岁。他于大约1476年与Lady Ursula Woodcock在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1522年12月在英国倫敦享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English wodecok ‘woodcock’ (Old English wuducocc, a compound of Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cocc ‘cock, bird’), a type of bird that is notoriously easy to catch. Therefore, the name might have been either for a person who caught or sold woodcock, or a nickname for a gullible person.

in some cases, because there can be confusion between -cock and -cot in surnames, and therefore the name may also be a variant of Woodcott, a habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cot ‘cottage, shelter’, such as Woodcott in Cheshire and Hampshire or Woodcote in Hampshire, Surrey, Oxfordshire, Warwickshire, and Shropshire, or from any residence at a cottage in or near a wood.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Woodcock was born about 1452, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir William Woodcock, was 32 and his mother, Alison Livesey, was 27. He married Lady Ursula Woodcock about 1476, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in December 1522, in London, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Woodcock est né environ 1452, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Woodcock, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alison Livesey, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Ursula Woodcock environ 1476, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en décembre 1522, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Woodcock um 1452 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Woodcock 32 und seine Mutter Alison Livesey 27. Er hat um 1476 in England Lady Ursula Woodcock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb im Dezember 1522 im Alter von 71 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Woodcock è nato il circa 1452 nel Lancaster, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Woodcock, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alison Livesey, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Ursula Woodcock circa 1476, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel dicembre 1522, nel London, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Woodcockが約1452年にイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターで生まれた時，父Sir William Woodcockは32歳，母Alison Liveseyは27歳であった。約1476年にイギリスでLady Ursula Woodcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1522年12月にイギリスロンドンで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Woodcock(이)가 대략 1452년 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Woodcock(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alison Livesey(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1476년 영국에서 Lady Ursula Woodcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1522년 12월 영국 런던에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Woodcock nasceu aproximadamente 1452, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Woodcock, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alison Livesey, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Ursula Woodcock aproximadamente 1476, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1522, em London, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Woodcock родился около 1452 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Woodcock было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alison Livesey, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Ursula Woodcock около 1476 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер декабрь 1522 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Woodcock nació aproximadamente 1452, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Woodcock, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alison Livesey, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Ursula Woodcock aproximadamente 1476, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en diciembre de 1522, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
